note: This directory vendors code from two upstreams. The Myers shortest-edit-script computation is in [merge3.ml] (from gazagnaire/ocaml-merge3). The unified-diff renderer and the Equal/Line/compute API shape are in [myers.ml] (from windtrap). See the in-file Notice blocks and the root [NOTICE.md] for the list of changes.

sources.description: Unified-diff renderer and Equal/Line/compute API shape
